issues.title: [DATA] Enforce learner identity, migration, retention, export, and deletion boundaries
issues.body:
## Outcome

Protect the owner's profile and learning history while preserving future multi-user migration.

## Scope

- Stable external learner identity mapping.
- SQLite/JSON migration, backup, export, delete, and restore.
- Content-free audit metadata.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Consumers cannot select arbitrary learner IDs.
- [ ] Migrations are idempotent and recoverable.
- [ ] Delete/export cover every stored record owned by the repository.
- [ ] Logs exclude submissions, prompts, and corrections by default.

issues.title: [TEST] Publish language contract fixtures and full offline test coverage
issues.body:
## Outcome

Provide deterministic producer fixtures and tests for application services, storage, prompts, and adapters.

## Scope

- Success and stable error fixtures.
- Migration and rollback fixtures.
- Correction/retry and mission idempotency.
- Cancellation and unavailable-provider tests.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Default tests require no network or real data.
- [ ] Gateway fixtures pass unchanged in `chat-assistant`.
- [ ] Contract drift fails CI.
- [ ] Privacy assertions inspect logs and exports.

issues.title: [QA] Evaluate coaching quality, adaptation, and regression behavior
issues.body:
## Outcome

Validate that English/Japanese coaching is strict, useful, grounded in learner history, and stable across prompt/model changes.

## Scope

- Synthetic IELTS writing, work communication, Japanese grammar, retry, and adaptive mission suites.
- Scoring rubric, false praise, hallucination, correction consistency, and insufficient-context cases.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Evaluation criteria and baselines are versioned.
- [ ] Regressions block release or require an explicit waiver.
- [ ] No evaluation uses private learner history by default.
- [ ] Model changes are compared against the current approved baseline.

issues.title: [DEPLOY] Package and version Lang Assistant for gateway consumption
issues.body:
## Outcome

Produce reproducible wheels or an approved isolated local service with explicit contract versions.

## Scope

- Pinned build, package metadata, configuration, data paths, health/readiness, and upgrade/rollback.
- No checkout-path assumptions.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Quân Sư consumes only a released public contract.
- [ ] Package installation does not start network services or read production data.
- [ ] Data migrations and rollback are documented.
- [ ] Windows and Linux smoke tests pass.

issues.title: [RELEASE] Validate standalone and Discord-mediated language coaching
issues.body:
## Outcome

Release only after the same use cases work through CLI and through Mama → Quân Sư.

## Scope

- Mission, correction/retry, explanation/drill, progress, restart, unavailable Ollama, migration, backup, and rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Exact SHAs, contract, prompt, and model versions are recorded.
- [ ] No direct Discord dependency exists.
- [ ] Delivery failure does not duplicate stored corrections.
- [ ] Previous data and package versions can be restored.
